description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

🆕 New Entry (Published: June 1, 2026)

We are recruiting participants for Eco Life DAY & WEEK Saitama 2026 (Summer).

This is a program where you commit to living sustainably—saving energy and resources—for either one day or one week using a simple checklist. In Hanno City, the Hanno Citizen Environmental Conference leads participation, and we warmly invite all residents to take part.

【Implementation Period】June 1, 2026 (Monday) – September 30, 2026 (Wednesday)

When you enter and report your results, you can see in real time how much carbon dioxide your efforts have reduced. Together, let's help prevent global warming.

【Past Results for Reference】
• Winter 2025: 1,720 total participants, 10,374,099 grams of CO₂ reduction
• Summer 2025: 1,976 total participants, 12,595,225 grams of CO₂ reduction

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/soshikikarasagasu/kankyokeizaibu/kankyomidorimizuka/10070.html
summary: ℹ️ Join Eco Life DAY & WEEK Saitama 2026 (Summer)
